title: Bare Bones x Mods
body:
![Bare Bones x Mods logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8a5c70e05f3530f66eb7954f15c14d6edb1a8e2.png)
-----------

### The resource pack for every trailer inspired adventure !

It is compatible with the latest versions of **+50 mods** just below 👇

<details>
<summary>The compatible mod list :</summary>

- Animal Garden Crocodile | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/animal-garden-crocodile)
- AppleSkin | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Bartering Station](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-bartering-station) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bartering-station)
- Cherished Worlds | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds)
- Cloth Config | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- Comforts | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts)
- [Cooked Carrots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-cooked-carrots) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cooked-carrots)
- [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-metals-x-create-aeronautics) *(work in progress)*
- Detail Armor Bar | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar)
- Distant Horizons | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- Dynamic Surroundings | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamicsurroundingsfabric)
- Easy Magic | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic)
- Effectual | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/effectual)
- EMI | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
- Entity Texture Features | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- Flimsy Torches | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/flimsy-torches)
- [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-guard-villagers) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers)
- [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-hmi) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)
- [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-immersive-aircraft) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)
- InteractiveStuff | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactivestuff)
- Inventory Sorting | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-sorting)
- Iris | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Just Dandy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-just-dandy) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-dandy)
- Language Reload | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
- Lightweight Inventory Sorting | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/lightweight-inventory-sorting)
- Luki's Strongholds | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/lukis-strongholds)
- Mod Menu | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [More Chests Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-more-chests-variants) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion)
- [MrCrayfish's Furniture Mods: Refurbished](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-refurbished-furniture) | [mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)
- Nether Chested | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-chested)
- Packed Packs | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/packed-packs)
- Particle Interactions | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-interactions)
- Particular | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular)
- Particulate | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/particulate)
- Patchouli | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)
- Polymorph | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph)
- Serene Seasons | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons)
- [Simple Copper Pipes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-simple-copper-pipes) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-pipes)
- Simple Voice Chat | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-small-ships) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships)
- Snow Real Magic | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-real-magic)
- [Snowy Spirit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-snowy-spirit) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowy-spirit)
- [Snuffles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-snuffles) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/snuffles-fabric)
- [Sooty Chimneys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-sooty-chimneys) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sooty-chimneys)
- [Splinecart](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-splinecart) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/splinecart)
- [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-subtle-effects) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-supplementaries) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Table Top Craft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-table-top-craft) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/table-top-craft)
- The Roads More Travelled | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-roads-more-travelled)
- Time Controller | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/time-controller)
- [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-toms-storage) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)
- [Trading Post](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-trading-post) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/trading-post)
- Ultimate Minecarts | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/ultimate_minecarts)
- Vegan Delight | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vegan-delight)
- Vegehenna | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vegehenna)
- [vista](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-vista) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vista_tv)
- Visuality | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Wilder Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-wilder-flowers) | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-flowers)
- YDM's Weapon Master | [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/weaponmaster)

Mods that are not clickable are only available in Bare Bones x Mods, there's no Modrinth page for these ones

</details>



<details>
<summary>The compatible resource pack list :</summary>

- [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-animations-player-extension)
- [Fresh Food](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-food)
- [Fresh Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-music-discs)
- [Fresh Flowers and Plants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-flowers-and-plants)
- Fresh Paintings
- [RAY's 3D Rails](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-rays-3d-rails)
- [RAY's 3D Ladders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-rays-3d-ladders)
- [Umbrella Villagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-umbrella-villagers)

</details>





⚙️ You have to place Bare Bones x Mods **at the top** in the resource pack list to make it work

- If you are playing with [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects) you can disable "Updated Smoke" in the mod config to get square smoke like the trailers ! (if there's not Subtle Effects in your mod list, the smoke will already be square)


> [BSL Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) preset [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fcuphxbLW_lBJ_u8v-fT_sFfEl08nbvp/view?usp=sharing) !

> [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) + [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) preset [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Z5LZbT2ZeQDPlcc4-Sy3hNuCzqcULTjP/view?usp=sharing) ! _(Do not use without Euphoria Patches)_

-----------


<details>
<summary>Example of use :</summary>

I'm playing Minecraft with these mods and resource packs : Distant Horizons, Supplementaries, Immersive Aircraft, Fresh Food, RAY's 3D Rails and RAY's 3D Ladders

Here is how the resource pack list should look :
> Bare Bones x Mods
>
> Fresh Food
> 
> RAY's 3D Ladders
> 
> RAY's 3D Rails
> 
> Bare Bones
> 
> Default Minecraft textures

This way you will get Bare Bones textures for every mods and resource packs used !


</details>




-----------

### [Trailer Vibes Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailer-vibes) ✨
